response.justification: While the candidate presents a very strong and diverse software development background with over 12 years of experience and excellent general engineering practices, they critically lack the mandatory hands-on C++ development experience (5-10 years on Windows) and the required financial domain expertise (Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income) explicitly sought for this role. The resume does not provide sufficient evidence of expertise in these core areas.
strengths: Extensive and diverse software development experience across multiple platforms.
Strong background in CI/CD, DevOps, and modern software craftsmanship principles.
Demonstrated ability to learn and adapt to various technologies and programming languages.
concerns: Very limited explicit professional C++ development experience, falling far short of the 5-10 year requirement.
No clear or explicit experience in Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking domains.
Lack of specific mention of substantial C++ development on the Windows platform.
